chapter_goal: Visualize how Morse handles on affine pieces explain the cohomology comparison between a variety and a hyperplane section.
checks: sample Hessian index is within the allowed range
restriction-map degree ledger matches theorem statement
lab: Move a hyperplane through a synthetic affine surface and count which critical levels affect the middle degree.
pitfalls: misreading the theorem's isomorphism and injection degree ranges
proof_moves: localize near a nondegenerate critical point
attach handles as levels cross critical values
bound the index range on affine varieties
visual_focus: Level-set handles and a hyperplane slice show why cohomology changes only in controlled degrees.
